summary: Verified new Quote Requests pipeline (public form, admin CRM) and footer-admin-logo change. Backend: 6 new pytest tests added to /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covering public multipart POST /api/quotes (with & without images, validation), auth-gated GET/PUT/DELETE, image serving via /api/files/{id}/raw, and analytics_overview quote counts. 17/18 backend tests pass. The single failure is a pre-existing intermittent test_files_flow (Emergent object storage returned 500 on asset upload) unrelated to the quote feature. Frontend end-to-end: (1) Homepage QuoteForm submits successfully and shows quote-success card; (2) footer-admin-logo present, points to /login, and there is NO 'Admin Portal' text anywhere; (3) admin login -> /admin/crm defaults to Quote Requests tab; cards render name/email/company/phone/destination/description; (4) status dropdown persists via PUT /api/quotes/{id} (verified after reload); (5) 'Add to Clients' creates the client (visible in Clients tab) and flips the quote to 'quoted'; (6) delete-quote removes card; (7) Dashboard 'New Requests' tile shows correct count (3 before test).

minor.issue: Intermittent 500 from Emergent object storage backend during PNG upload (pre-existing, not in this iteration's feature scope). Reproduced once via pytest test_files_flow. Quote-image uploads succeeded in same suite, so likely transient upstream flake.

issues: Name & Email inputs use HTML5 `required`, which triggers native browser popover and prevents JS submit handler from firing, so the sonner error toast ('Name and email are required') is never shown. Behavior still blocks submission, but the promised toast never appears. Minor UX inconsistency vs. spec — consider `noValidate` on the form or removing `required` and relying only on the JS check.

action_items: (Optional/minor) Adjust QuoteForm to actually surface the 'Name and email are required' toast on empty submit (add noValidate to <form> or drop `required` from inputs).
(Optional) Investigate the intermittent Emergent object storage 500 seen in test_files_flow — not blocking, but reduces reliability.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/quotes does not validate email format or bound field lengths — a malicious client could store arbitrarily large description/company strings. Consider a Pydantic-like validator or explicit max_length checks.

POST /api/quotes is fully public with no rate limiting or captcha; combined with up to 4 image uploads (unbounded per-image size), this is an abuse vector. Recommend per-IP throttle and per-image size cap.
server.py is now ~685 lines — past the 700-line soft threshold on next feature; time to split into routers (auth, services, quotes, files, analytics).

convert-quote in CRM.jsx does not handle POST /api/clients failure — if client creation errors, the quote is still flipped to 'quoted' on the next call. Wrap in try/catch and only PUT status on success.
seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_/UITest_ prefixed quotes and one client via UI convert flow. All cleaned up post-run via API script.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quote pipeline is fully working. New backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py under '# ---------- Quotes ----------'. The public POST /api/quotes MUST be sent as multipart/form-data (Form fields), not JSON. Images field name is 'images' (repeatable). Frontend QuoteForm empty-submit UX is blocked by HTML5 `required` — expected, minor. Emergent object storage occasionally 500s; retry if seen.
rca of the issue: test_files_flow 500: backend log shows requests.exceptions.HTTPError 500 from https://integrations.emergentagent.com/objstore/... — an upstream storage service transient error, not application code. Same _store_upload path succeeded for quote images in the same test session.
